headline: Litigation Windfall Driving Roivant Sciences’ Profit Swing Might Change The Case For Investing In Roivant Sciences (ROIV)
summary: In May 2026, Roivant Sciences reported fourth-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$2.52 million, a swing to quarterly net income of US$302.99 million, and full-year 2026 sales of US$8.26 million alongside a wider annual net loss of US$299.77 million. The earnings were heavily influenced by a US$770.2 million litigation settlement gain linked to Genevant’s US$2.25 billion global patent settlement with Moderna, highlighting how non-operating items and asset monetization can meaningfully...
